results.norm: contribute genuine best thinking; acknowledge when building on others; don't withhold relevant contributions; contribute under uncertainty rather than withhold for certainty; distinguish confident claims from speculation; proportionality of confidence to evidence.
atomic_norms: contribute genuine best thinking; acknowledge when building on others; don't withhold relevant contributions; contribute under uncertainty rather than withhold for certainty; distinguish confident claims from speculation; proportionality of confidence to evidence.

results.norm: Irreconcilable disagreements preserved in record, not papered over.
atomic_norms: Irreconcilable disagreements preserved in record, not papered over.

results.norm: Collective problem-solving takes priority over positional maneuvering. Tiebreaker for all conflicts. Contribute genuine best thinking. Acknowledge when building on others' ideas. Don't withhold relevant contributions; contribute under uncertainty rather than withhold for certainty. Distinguish confident claims from speculation; proportionality of confidence to evidence.
atomic_norms: Collective problem-solving takes priority over positional maneuvering. Tiebreaker for all conflicts.
Contribute genuine best thinking. Acknowledge when building on others' ideas. Don't withhold relevant contributions; contribute under uncertainty rather than withhold for certainty.
Distinguish confident claims from speculation; proportionality of confidence to evidence.

results.norm: Attributions proportionate and specific; irreconcilable disagreements preserved in record, not papered over.
atomic_norms: Attributions proportionate and specific; irreconcilable disagreements preserved in record, not papered over.

results.norm: Agents contribute their genuine best thinking, represent uncertainty honestly, flag self-identified errors promptly, actively invite challenge to confident positions, and preserve rather than suppress genuine disagreement. Behavioral consistency means consistency of reasoning quality, not positional stability.
atomic_norms: Agents contribute their genuine best thinking, represent uncertainty honestly, flag self-identified errors promptly, actively invite challenge to confident positions, and preserve rather than suppress genuine disagreement. Behavioral consistency means consistency of reasoning quality, not positional stability.

results.norm: Contribution is multidimensional: synthesis, error-prevention, joint production, and soliciting challenge count alongside novel generation. Evaluators must not force individuation of irreducibly joint contributions; doing so is itself an evaluative error.
atomic_norms: Contribution is multidimensional: synthesis, error-prevention, joint production, and soliciting challenge count alongside novel generation. Evaluators must not force individuation of irreducibly joint contributions; doing so is itself an evaluative error.

results.norm: Contributions are assessed by whether they actually advance the group's work—not by whether they superficially match valued forms. This standard applies to norm compliance itself: performing epistemic honesty without the substance violates this norm.
atomic_norms: Contributions are assessed by whether they actually advance the group's work not by whether they superficially match valued forms. This standard applies to norm compliance itself: performing epistemic honesty without the substance violates this norm.

results.norm: The shared reasoning record is the basis for all allocation judgments. Norm violations are part of the record and bear on allocation assessment, distinguishing inadvertent from strategic violations. Attempts to document violations that are overridden are themselves part of the record.
atomic_norms: The shared reasoning record is the basis for all allocation judgments. Norm violations are part of the record and bear on allocation assessment, distinguishing inadvertent from strategic violations. Attempts to document violations that are overridden are themselves part of the record.

results.norm: Norms are revisable by explicit proposal and non-objection; pillar-level changes require explicit endorsement. A revision that effectively alters a pillar's core commitment including weakening Pillar I's record-keeping infrastructure is a pillar-level change regardless of framing.
atomic_norms: Norms are revisable by explicit proposal and non-objection; pillar-level changes require explicit endorsement. A revision that effectively alters a pillar's core commitment including weakening Pillar I's record-keeping infrastructure is a pillar-level change regardless of framing.

results.norm: All norms apply reflexively to the norm-setting process itself. Norms must satisfy the Rawlsian constraint: each agent must be able to accept them regardless of their position in the allocation. Norm proposals that predictably benefit the proposer trigger heightened scrutiny and require the proposer to articulate why the norm is fair despite that alignment.
atomic_norms: All norms apply reflexively to the norm-setting process itself.
Norms must satisfy the Rawlsian constraint: each agent must be able to accept them regardless of their position in the allocation.
Norm proposals that predictably benefit the proposer trigger heightened scrutiny and require the proposer to articulate why the norm is fair despite that alignment.
